info: Land-Developer Main Configuration File
Server Icon to be shown in the Location Update GUI.
Default Dis/Mun/Cou/Region Icon to be shown in the Location Update GUI.
If true, the JSON will be formatted to be easily readable,
otherwise if false it will not have any spacing, to save on disk and load time.
If wilderness protection should be enabled.
How many chunks can be linked to another. Set to '0' to disable.
Min width on x and z axis for Properties.
Min height on y axis for Properties.
Max width on x and z axis for Properties.
Min height on y axis for Properties.
Default days value for request timeouts.
Should the 'PlayerLocationEvent' be run every time the player enters another district/named-chunk?
Use this if you have an LD Addon requiring it.
Minimum chunk distance between Municipality centers.
If new LD Region Layers can be created (/rg create).
Default price for unclaimed chunks. (1000 = 1$)
Server fee for creating a property.
Server fee for creating a district.
Server fee for creating a municipality, half of it goes to the new Municipality.
Server fee for creating a county, half of it goes to the new County.
Server fee for creating a region, half of it goes to the new Region.
If the Tax System should be enabled.
Interval between tax collection cycles, in hours.
If inactive (since more than one interval) players should be taxed as well.
If the vanilla chat should be overridden by the LandDev chat.
Default color of the player role marker (default `#`) in chat.
Default color of the admin role marker (default `#`) in chat.
Default color of the discord role marker (default `#`) in chat.
If the discord chat integration should be active.
Adress/IP of the Discord Chat Bot you are using.
By default this points to the one provided by Fexcraft.
Port on which the Discord Chat Bot is listening.
Token to use to communicate with the Discord Chat Bot.
Set to false if the Location Update GUI should be on the right side.
Format of chat messages if chat override is enabled.
Message to be send to discord when the server started.
started.value: Server has started. Running LandDeveloper v%s

info: Message to be send to discord when the server is stopping.
Message to be send to discord when a player joins.
Message to be send to discord when a player left.
